# castai_ai_optimizer_model_specs (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `model` (String) Model name to look up.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `registry_type` (String) Registry type of the model specs.
